calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Co-Trustees First Account And Report Of The Special Needs Trust
Off Calendar Aug-29-2012 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An accounting was ordered on July 29, 2011. No appearance was made and the accounting has not been filed. An Order to Appear will be issued to the Trustees and the Attorney to appear on September 26, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why the Co-Trustees First Account has not been filed. The status hearing was also continued to that date.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Santiago.

Upon further review, the Court found that an accounting petition was filed under the new trust case number (296010) with a hearing date of October 23, 2012. The Order to Appear will not be issued and the status hearing is taken off calendar.

Petition To Approve Disposition Of Proceeds Of Judgment
Off Calendar Jul-29-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Suzanne McDonnell for and with Gina Buck.

Ms. McDonnell stated that Vernon did not want to come to San Francisco. The Court stated that the petitions seemed to be in order. Bond is set at $83,000.00. Status of the First Account was set for August 29, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Ms. McDonnell and Ms Buck spoke of the York Street property, stated that there is about $50,000.00 a year coming in the property, that Vernon's share is about 1/12th and that the porperty is going to be sold. Both petitions were taken under submission for the Court to reflect on the issue of whether it is the Co-Tustees obligation to have Court confirmation on the sale of the property. Ms. McDonnell will revise the proposed orders once she hears from the Probate Examiner.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

PETITION
Off Calendar Jul-29-2011 Granted Per Written Order
